items.title_en: Replimune to resubmit twice-rejected drug for approval after FDA shakeup
items.title_zh: FDA 重组后 Replimune 将重新提交两次被拒绝的药物以供批准
items.desc_en: Replimune was among the drugmakers that had criticized the FDA for what they called inconsistent guidance around trials and approvals.
items.desc_zh: Replimune 是批评 FDA 所谓试验和批准指导不一致的制药商之一。

items.title_en: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
items.title_zh: 在马斯克的言论与 IPO 申请出现分歧后，SpaceX 的怀疑论者增加了担忧的理由
items.desc_en: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.
items.desc_zh: 在 X 上的一篇帖子中，埃隆·马斯克提供了有关 SpaceX 与 Anthropic 交易的细节，这些细节并未包含在该公司的 IPO 招股说明书中。

items.title_en: How the ‘double scar’ of past inflation woes and geopolitical shocks amid the Iran war is hitting consumers
items.title_zh: 过去的通胀困境和伊朗战争中的地缘政治冲击的“双重伤痕”如何打击消费者
items.desc_en: Mental "scars" reinforce fears of stagflation, when rising prices coincide with declining growth, research finds.
items.desc_zh: 研究发现，当物价上涨与经济增长下降同时发生时，精神上的“伤痕”会加剧人们对滞胀的担忧。

items.title_en: Dan Ives: Anthropic’s growth is 'just the tip of the sphere' for AI rally
items.title_zh: Dan Ives：Anthropic 的增长只是人工智能集会的“冰山一角”
items.desc_en: Ives' comments come as part of a wider prediction for the Nasdaq to top 30,000 points by 2027, reiterating his call from earlier interviews with CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 艾夫斯的言论是纳斯达克指数到 2027 年突破 30,000 点的更广泛预测的一部分，重申了他之前接受 CNBC 采访时的预测。

items.title_en: Oil drops 20% from 2026 peak on optimism over U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks

items.desc_zh: 由于希望中东持久停火能够解锁霍尔木兹海峡，全球油价大幅下跌。

items.desc_zh: 警方表示，这次行动的目标是臭名昭著的已故西西里黑手党老大马泰奥·梅西纳·德纳罗的网络。

items.title_en: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
items.title_zh: 以色列对黎巴嫩首都进行“定点打击”
items.desc_en: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 尽管以色列和真主党都互相指责对方违反了上个月的停火协议，但贝鲁特迄今为止基本上没有受到影响。

items.title_en: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.title_zh: 瑞士火车站刺伤三人受伤男子被捕
items.desc_en: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，由于车站周围地区已被封锁，嫌疑人是一名 31 岁的瑞士男子，他已被逮捕。

items.desc_zh: 这些研究人员将前往非洲抗击埃博拉病毒，但特朗普削减了他们的资助 随着人们对美国应对措施的担忧日益加剧，博拉病毒正在蔓延 The Hill 美国正在应对埃博拉疫情 The AtlanticFrid

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_en: King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip
items.title_zh: 国王学院团队获得尖端谷歌量子芯片的使用权
items.desc_en: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.
items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。

items.title_en: Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans
items.title_zh: Meta 多次因 Facebook 和 Instagram 用户禁令而冷落欧盟机构
items.desc_en: The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.
items.desc_zh: 数百名用户联系了 BBC，声称他们被错误地禁止访问这些网站。

items.title_en: Jill Biden says she thought husband was 'having a stroke' during 2024 debate
items.title_zh: 吉尔·拜登表示，她认为丈夫在 2024 年辩论中“中风”
items.desc_en: The former US first lady told CBS News that she was frightened by Joe Biden's performance against Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 这位美国前第一夫人告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻，她对乔·拜登对阵唐纳德·特朗普的表现感到害怕。

items.title_en: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。

items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车

items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。
